main.title: US‑Israel Strikes and Tehran’s Retaliation Escalate Middle East Conflict
main.summary: Coordinated strikes by US and Israeli forces against Tehran have sharply escalated the Iran conflict, drawing international concern. Retaliatory missile and drone attacks by Iran have targeted Gulf bases and triggered a wider regional security crisis.

breaking.title: Mass Flights Cancelled Across Middle East Hub Airports
breaking.summary: Airspace closures in major Gulf cities have led to cancellations and widespread travel disruption amid ongoing conflict.

breaking.title: World Leaders Urge Restraint as Conflict Intensifies
breaking.summary: International leaders condemn the escalation, warning of broader instability.

nigeria.title: Nigeria Seeks FIFA Verdict Amid World Cup Qualification Dispute
nigeria.summary: Nigeria’s football community awaits a ruling on DR Congo eligibility issues that could impact World Cup qualification hopes.

nigeria.title: Oil Rally from Middle East Conflict May Support Naira, but Risks Remain
nigeria.summary: Rising oil prices due to Middle East conflict could support Nigeria’s forex liquidity, though inflationary pressures still threaten the economy.

europe.title: European Leaders Condemn Escalation in Iran Conflict
europe.summary: EU and NATO officials call for diplomacy and de‑escalation as tensions widen in the Middle East.

america.title: US Confirms Role in Strikes on Iran After Supreme Leader’s Death
america.summary: Following the reported killing of Iran’s Supreme Leader in recent airstrikes, the US confirmed involvement, adding pressure for global diplomatic engagement.

africa.title: African Union Calls for Restraint as Middle East Crisis Deepens
africa.summary: The African Union warns that wider conflict risks destabilising economies and security across Africa, urging peaceful negotiations.

asia.title: Airspace Shutdowns in Asia as Global Travel Disruptions Continue
asia.summary: Major Asian airlines report flight disruptions due to Middle East airspace closures, affecting travellers and trade.

politics.title: World Leaders Warn of Broader Instability After Iran Strikes
politics.summary: International leaders have strongly condemned recent strikes and called for renewed diplomatic efforts to prevent further escalation.

business.title: OPEC+ Agrees to Raise Oil Production Amid Global Tensions
business.summary: OPEC+ announced a modest increase in production to stabilise markets even as geopolitical risk persists.

sport.title: Nigeria Await FIFA Decision on 2026 World Cup Qualification Dispute
sport.summary: Super Eagles’ World Cup hopes hang in the balance as FIFA delays a verdict on eligibility issues following DRC’s win.

music.title: Global Streaming Trends show Mixed Genres Lead Charts
music.summary: Diverse music genres dominate streaming platforms, with African artists gaining notable traction worldwide.

movies.title: International Film Festival Showcases New Global Cinema
movies.summary: Cinema from around the world gains spotlight at a major film festival, highlighting diverse storytelling and talent.
